results.title: “Easily trigger nahi hona, be mindful”: Shreyas Iyer’s advice to sister Shresta before she entered ‘Lock Upp’ show
results.description: Mumbai: Indian cricket captain Shreyas Iyer’s sister, Shresta Iyer, was recently evicted from Netflix’s reality show Lock Upp, bringing her first-ever reality television stint to an early end. results.title: Nintendo Confirms Switch 1 Global Availability After Announcing European Withdrawal
results.description: Continental drift. Nintendo has confirmed its plans to continue selling Switch 1, after yesterday announcing that sales would be suspended in Europe .
